name: usrp-proxy
description: Local MCP proxy for remote USRP MCP server with software-defined radio capabilities
long_description: This extension provides a local MCP proxy that connects to a remote USRP MCP server, enabling Claude Desktop to control software-defined radio equipment via UHD tools. Features comprehensive signal generation with 25+ parameters, GNU Radio integration for data capture, background process management, and professional logging. Includes device discovery, hardware probing, and complete radio hardware management through a clean MCP interface.

tools.name: uhd_find_devices
tools.description: Find all connected UHD devices with structured JSON output

tools.name: uhd_usrp_probe
tools.description: Probe USRP device for detailed hardware information

tools.name: uhd_siggen
tools.description: Generate signals on USRP with comprehensive parameter control (25+ parameters)

tools.name: uhd_rx_cfile
tools.description: Capture RF samples from USRP to complex file using GNU Radio

tools.name: list_shared_files
tools.description: List all files in the shared data directory (captures, screenshots, etc.)

tools.name: get_uhd_info
tools.description: Get UHD installation and configuration information

tools.name: stop_process
tools.description: Stop a running UHD background process

tools.name: list_processes
tools.description: List all running UHD background processes

tools.name: cleanup_all_processes
tools.description: Stop all running UHD background processes

tools.name: vnc_screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot from the configured VNC server

server_url.title: USRP Server URL
server_url.description: URL of the remote USRP MCP server (e.g., https://uhd-mcp-route-mcp-services.apps.tenoran.automation.otic.open6g.net/mcp)

request_timeout.title: Request Timeout (seconds)
request_timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for server responses
